tbm_grant_air_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # aa_lmg - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_lmg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # engines_1 - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_fighter - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cv_early_fighter - 1933

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cv_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # scout_plane1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "La Resistance"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_small_airframe - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # survivability_studies - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { survivability_studies = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aa_hmg - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_hmg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # aa_cannon_1 - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # engines_2 - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # range_improvements - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { range_improvements = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

    if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fighter3 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { fighter3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cv_fighter3 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_fighter3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_fighter3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rocket_airframe_tech_2 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_airframe_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_airframe_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1947 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # rocket_airframe_tech_3 - 1947
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_airframe_tech_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_airframe_tech_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aa_cannon_4 - 1947
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_cannon_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # modern_small_airframe_2 - 1947

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_small_airframe_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_tech = jet_engines_2
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_small_airframe_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # jet_fighter2 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jet_fighter2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { jet_fighter2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # supersonic_fighter1 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = supersonic_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # modern_small_airframe_3 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_small_airframe_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_small_airframe_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rocket_airframe_tech_4 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_airframe_tech_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_airframe_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # supersonic_small_airframe - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = supersonic_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # modern_small_airframe_5 - 1960

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_small_airframe_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = jump_jet_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { jump_jet_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aa_cannon_5 - 1960
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_cannon_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (12 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1943 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_2
#   year=1947 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_3
#   year=1950 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_4
#   year=1955 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_medium_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # heavy_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_medium_airframe - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) --

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cv_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # naval_bomber1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cv_naval_bomber1 - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_1
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1943 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_2
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_2
#   year=1947 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_parasite_fighter
#   year=1949 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_3
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_3
#   year=1952 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_4
#   year=1955 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1957 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1952 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1952 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1957 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1957 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_large_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # strategic_bomber1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_large_airframe - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mothership_aircraft_tech_0 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mothership_aircraft_tech_0 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { mothership_aircraft_tech_0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # reinforced_wings_mothership - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = reinforced_wings_mothership }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { reinforced_wings_mothership = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }

                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # strategic_bomber3 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # miniature_fighters - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = miniature_fighters }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { miniature_fighters = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1949 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # advanced_parasite_fighter - 1949
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_parasite_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_parasite_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) --

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # early_bomber - 1933

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }

        }
    }

# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (10 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1936 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1942 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_4
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_5
#   year=1950 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_6
#   year=1955 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_7
#   year=1960 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
