# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ELECTRONICS (25 techs) --

# electronic_mechanical_engineering
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanical_computing
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_radio
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# computing_machine
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_encryption
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_decryption
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_computing_machine
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_encryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_radio
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_computing_machine
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_encryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_decryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# fire_control_radar
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# anti_ship_missile_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance]

# postwar_computing_tech1
#   year=1947 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# fire_control_radar_1
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_computing_tech2
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_computing_tech3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# fire_control_radar_2
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_computing_tech4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # radio - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_radio - 1938

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_radio }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # basic_decryption - 1938

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_decryption }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# coastal_fort_tech_1
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_machine_tools
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# concentrated_industry
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[dispersed_industry]

# dispersed_industry
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[concentrated_industry]

# construction3
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# excavation3
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# land_fort_tech_2
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# coastal_fort_tech_2
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# assembly_line_production
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# concentrated_industry4
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[dispersed_industry4]

# dispersed_industry4
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[concentrated_industry4]

# fuel_refining4
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_oil_processing
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_rubber_processing
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# construction4
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# agriculture_2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# flexible_line
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[streamlined_line]

# streamlined_line
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[flexible_line]

# concentrated_industry5
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[dispersed_industry5]

# dispersed_industry5
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 XOR=[concentrated_industry5]

# fuel_refining5
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# modern_oil_processing
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# plastics_1
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[assembly_line_6, industry6]

# agriculture_3
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=industry

# agriculture_5
#   year=1956 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# fuel_refining9
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# oil_processing_1960
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# rubber_processing_1960
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# construction9
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# excavation9
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# assembly_line_9
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# plastics_4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[assembly_line_9, industry9]

# agriculture_6
#   year=1961 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1956 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1956 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1961 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1961 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_machine_tools - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry - 1936
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_silos - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_silos }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_silos = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # synth_oil_experiments - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = synth_oil_experiments }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { synth_oil_experiments = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # excavation1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # agriculture_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = agriculture_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { agriculture_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_machine_tools - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_equipment_conversion - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_equipment_conversion }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_equipment_conversion = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry2 - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry2 }
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry2 - 1937
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry2 }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining2 - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # oil_processing - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { oil_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rubber_processing - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rubber_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { rubber_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction2 - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # excavation2 - 1937
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry3 }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry3 - 1939

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry3 }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = flexible_line }
                NOT = { has_tech = streamlined_line }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # dispersed_industry5 - 1943

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry5 }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # plastics_3 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = plastics_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
                has_tech = assembly_line_8
                has_tech = industry8
            }
            set_technology = { plastics_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # atomic_research - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (14 techs) --

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_2
#   year=1947 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_3
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_2
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2]

# naval_chaff
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3]

# postwar_radar_tech_5
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # radio_detection - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_f
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1951 = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1957 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1957 = yes

        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1960 = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # hardened_silo - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = hardened_silo }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { hardened_silo = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # motorized_rocket_unit - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = experimental_rockets
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = mothership_aircraft_tech_0
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            set_technology = { parasite_fighter_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_rocket_engines - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_rocket_engines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { slcm_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1955 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # rocket_artillery_e - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_e }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_artillery_e = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # interceptor_engine_4 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = interceptor_engine_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { interceptor_engine_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_flying_bomb_4 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_flying_bomb_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_flying_bomb_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_sam_missile_3 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_sam_missile_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_sam_missile_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_nuclear_missile_2 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_nuclear_missile_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_nuclear_missile_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 - 1957

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1957 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1957 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
