            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # post_war_diesel_locomotives - 1948
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = post_war_diesel_locomotives }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { post_war_diesel_locomotives = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_recon5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_recon5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_military_police5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # tech_maintenance_company5 - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_logistics_company5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_signal_company5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_field_hospital5 - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
                has_tech = health_4
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support_y1955 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # night_vision2 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = night_vision2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { night_vision2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_engineers6 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_recon6 - 1955

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # tech_military_police6 - 1955

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_maintenance_company6 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_logistics_company6 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_signal_company6 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # diesel_electric_locomotives - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = diesel_electric_locomotives }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { diesel_electric_locomotives = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_field_hospital6 - 1955
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
                has_tech = health_5
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# twoplane_stab
#   year=1955 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car6
#   year=1960 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car_at_upgrade_2
#   year=1960 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# comp_armor
#   year=1960 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943 = yes

            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "La Resistance"
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "La Resistance"
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_light_td - 1934

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_tank - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # armored_car2 - 1940

                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car2 }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

    }

    if = {
        limit = {

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_light_td - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_light_art - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_tank_2 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_art }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { modern_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # modern_spaa - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { modern_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rangefinder1 - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangefinder1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { rangefinder1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # imp_stab - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = imp_stab }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_tech = improved_computing_machine
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { imp_stab = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic

            }
            set_technology = { comp_armor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (17 techs) --

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy_2
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_heavy_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_battlecruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_battleship - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_heavy - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_battleship - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        # heavy_battleship - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # ship_hull_super_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships

            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships

# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (14 techs) --

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_escort_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_4
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_6
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1954 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1958 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_carrier - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_carrier - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_carrier - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_carrier - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # ship_hull_escort_carrier - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_escort_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_escort_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }
        # sp_refined_pykrete - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_refined_pykrete = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / DESTROYERS (24 techs) --

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sonar
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_sonar
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_destroyer
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1941 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_light_5
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_5
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_light_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# ship_hull_light_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# towed_sonar
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1954 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1958 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_destroyer - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_light - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # smoke_generator - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
        # sonar - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    }

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # improved_destroyer - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { improved_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) --

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
