# -- NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (12 techs) --

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_cruiser_5
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_cruiser_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_helicopter_carrier
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[early_ship_hull_carrier, naval_helicopter_1]

# ship_hull_cruiser_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1954 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1958 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_light_cruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_cruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                has_tech = naval_helicopter_1
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_helicopter_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# landing_platform_helicopter
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

        }

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # transport - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = transport }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_torpedo - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_naval_mines - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # submarine_mine_laying - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { submarine_mine_laying = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mtg_transport - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mtg_transport }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { mtg_transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_1

        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_3
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_4

        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_2
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_3
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_4

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): asw_torpedo
        # advanced_submarine_mine_laying - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine_mine_laying }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # naval_mines_1950 - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_mines_1950 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { naval_mines_1950 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # naval_mines_1950b - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_mines_1950b }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { naval_mines_1950b = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # adv_tank_landing_craft - 1950
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = adv_tank_landing_craft }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { adv_tank_landing_craft = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (28 techs) --

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# midget_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# tanker_submarines
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# cruiser_submarines
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# cruiser_submarines
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# midget_submarines
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_carrier_submarine
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_fleet_submarine
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_fleet_submarine_2
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_sail
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# ship_hull_attack_boat
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_carrier_submarine_2
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_fleet_submarine_3
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_sail
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# ship_hull_rocket_submarine
#   year=1956 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_nuclear_attack_sub
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_missile_submarine
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1949 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1954 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1956 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1956 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1958 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_submarine - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_submarine - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # midget_submarine - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = midget_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { midget_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_submarine - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_submarine - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tanker_submarines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tanker_submarines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { tanker_submarines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cruiser_submarines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cruiser_submarines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { cruiser_submarines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cruiser_submarines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cruiser_submarines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { cruiser_submarines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # midget_submarines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = midget_submarines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { midget_submarines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_submarine - 1943

                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_fleet_submarine }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
